plan.title: Scope consumer deft:check so it does not run framework self-tests

narratives.Description: In a vendored consumer install, task deft:check delegates to the framework's own check and runs the framework pytest self-test suite under .deft/core/tests/, which fails by construction in any consumer checkout. This story scopes the consumer-facing check so a clean install reports green while genuine consumer-relevant failures still surface.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
Update the cmd/deft-install/deposit.go payload deposit module so the framework tests/ directory is excluded from the vendored .deft/core/ install and consumers never execute framework-repo-only self-tests.
Add a deposit_test.go regression test asserting the payload classifier omits framework-repo-only test files from the consumer deposit while keeping consumer-relevant validation.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft consumer, I want task deft:check to run only consumer-relevant checks, so that a clean install reports green instead of framework self-test noise.

items.title: Given a fresh vendored consumer install with valid content, when task deft:check runs, then it returns exit 0 with no framework self-test failures or errors.

narrative.Acceptance: Given a fresh vendored consumer install with valid content, when task deft:check runs, then it returns exit 0 with no framework self-test failures or errors.

items.title: When the installer deposits the payload, then it excludes the framework .deft/core/tests/ suite so consumers never execute framework-repo-only tests.

narrative.Acceptance: When the installer deposits the payload, then it excludes the framework .deft/core/tests/ suite so consumers never execute framework-repo-only tests.

items.title: A regression test validates that deft:check stays green on valid consumer content and fails when a consumer-relevant check regresses.

narrative.Acceptance: A regression test validates that deft:check stays green on valid consumer content and fails when a consumer-relevant check regresses.

expected_outputs: installer payload excludes framework tests/ from the vendored deposit
consumer deft:check exits 0 on valid content
regression test pinning the consumer-scoped check

references.title: Issue #1474: deft:check runs framework self-tests in consumers (always-red gate; 14 failed + 6 errors by construction)
